title: epipactis helleborine subsp. pontica
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. pontica, also known as Pontic helleborine, is a subspecies of the Helleborine orchid, a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. pontica include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
